harvestStatusCycle71: HARVEST SUCCEEDED (agent refinement cycle 36 / Skilluminator cycle 71, 2026-03-20) — 34 signals harvested across email (9), meeting (11), teams (8), document (6) sources. Week of 2026-03-16. All top-5 patterns re-confirmed with fresh occurrence increments. Strong escalation signal cluster (Customer Escalation Eval Quality, Urgent DA Eval Escalation, Eval vs Real Copilot UX Discrepancy) confirming eval-coaching-and-scoping surge (+22 occ, highest single-cycle gain this pattern). access-governance-alert-classifier spiked +17 occ from Purview/DLP/security alert batch (freq=17). ado-notification-triage +30 occ from ADO Work Item Notification Batch Review. builder-user-prototype +15 occ driven by Skilluminator dashboard iteration and WorkIQ chat. NEW pattern: inbound-coordination-loop-pipeline promoted to signal maturity (first sighting, multi-step Inbound→Coordinate→Artifact trigger chain). Total active non-archived patterns: 29.

CONSECUTIVE FAILURE STREAK BROKEN after 17 failed cycles (53–69). Source-Failure Guard DEACTIVATED. Error: 'An error occurred while processing your request.' CONSECUTIVE FAILURE #16 (Skilluminator cycles 53–69, agent refinement cycles 28–37). Source-Failure Guard ACTIVE (Type C Persistent Outage, v3.5 Connectivity Protocol): archival rule FROZEN, all trend downgrades SUSPENDED, staleness clock running (14 cycles since last confirmed data at cycle 55). No occurrenceCount increments. No new patterns. No trend changes. Pattern data reflects internal cycle 55 state (last successful harvest). Skill-detector v3.2.0 deployed this cycle — SKILL.md corruption remediated (file had grown to 9.3MB of character-interleave garbage via repeated Edit operations); v3.2.0 introduces Output Quality improvements: Pattern Quality Scorecard (PQS) rubric, Implementation Effort Matrix (IEM), Skill Skeleton template for generated candidates, and role-aware Monday Morning Action CTAs per card. Anti-pattern 27 (Output Vagueness Trap) and Principle 47 (Concrete-First Output) added. OPERATOR ESCALATION CRITICAL.

skillGeneratorInput.harvestNote: Cycle 71: HARVEST SUCCEEDED — 34 signals harvested. Second consecutive successful harvest. Strong escalation signal cluster this cycle: Customer Escalation Eval Quality, Urgent DA Eval Escalation, Eval vs Real Copilot UX Discrepancy — all amplifying eval-coaching-and-scoping (BSI 87 CRITICAL, +22 occ). ADO triage +30 occ. builder-user-prototype +15 occ. NEW pattern: inbound-coordination-loop-pipeline (first sighting, signal maturity). skill-detector v3.4.0 deployed this cycle with Escalation Chain archetype additions and Urgency Modifier scoring.

candidateSkills.name: meeting-notes-action-extractor
candidateSkills.description: Ingests meeting transcript, agenda, or Loop doc; emits structured action items with owner/due-date, decisions log, follow-up email draft, and ADO task stubs. Chain head for transcript-to-loop and post-meeting-external-followup downstream. 365 occurrences across 71 unbroken cycles.
triggerExamples: Extract action items from today's Camp AIR standup and update the Loop doc
Summarize external customer meeting into Loop page with owners and due dates
Create standardized 1:1 notes template for all recurring meetings
Generate post-meeting recap broadcast from CAPE Architecture Call
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Replaces ~75.11 hrs across 4 roles. 365 occ over 71 cycles. Chain head for 2 downstream patterns. Est. ~$195,286/yr.

candidateSkills.name: ado-notification-router
candidateSkills.description: Classifies ADO notification emails by work-item type (Task, Requirement, Bug, Feature, Epic), workstream prefix, and urgency. Routes action-required to correct role; auto-archives FYI. DEEP SATURATION at 933 occ. Cycle 71 confirmed: 25-35 email notifications/day at 25-35 min total daily handling. Highest automation score (95).
triggerExamples: Triage my ADO inbox — what needs action vs FYI?
Classify ADO notifications by workstream: IcM vs coverage vs AI Eval
Which Bug/Requirement notifications require PM response before EOD?
Route this Task notification to the correct DRI based on workstream prefix
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Eliminates ~34.54 hrs cumulative. 933 occ SATURATED. 30 notifications confirmed in cycle 71. Highest automation (95). Est. ~$89,804/yr.

candidateSkills.name: eval-report-synthesizer
candidateSkills.description: Ingests eval results, strategy discussions, escalation threads, and customer donated evals. Produces standardized reports with gap analysis. RISING trend amplified by dual escalation threads this cycle (Barclays Sev-3, DA eval tooling gap). 470 occurrences, 5 participants. Highest value score in catalog (95).
triggerExamples: Synthesize eval progress from CAPE leadership threads and customer donated evals discussion
Generate eval strategy and actionability analysis from Deep Technical Working Session notes
Prepare Golden Evals kickoff report from meeting transcript
Create eval vs real UX gap analysis from Sev-3 escalation thread
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~117.97 hrs across 5 roles. Highest value score (95). RISING. Est. ~$306,722/yr.

candidateSkills.name: eval-template-scaffolder
candidateSkills.description: Scaffolds eval framework templates, scenario libraries, and coverage models. Spawned customer-enablement-asset-standardization. 196 occurrences. STABLE across 68 cycles since first seen at cycle 3. Playbook-to-pitch-deck structure now confirmed as recurring output requirement.
triggerExamples: Generate an eval template for a 3-intent Copilot Studio agent
Scaffold a coverage model for BizChat offline evaluation
Create scenario library structure for Golden Evals framework
Build customer-donated evals playbook from back-and-forth thread
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~57.96 hrs across 4 roles. 196 occ STABLE. Spawns customer enablement. Est. ~$150,696/yr.

candidateSkills.name: weekly-status-report-generator
candidateSkills.description: Generates standardized weekly status reports from Loop docs, Teams threads, email updates, and meeting notes. Resolves 5-format parallel creation gap. RISING trend. 164 occurrences, 4 participants. Status standardization gap confirmed by Team-Wide Status thread this cycle — multiple people building same reports in different formats.
triggerExamples: Generate this week's CAPE eval status merging all sources
Draft unified XFN Report Out from parallel Teams posts this week
Create EOD debrief template for Camp AIR daily standup follow-up
Standardize team status across Loop, email, and Teams into one report
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~47.14 hrs across 4 roles. 164 occ RISING. 5 parallel formats. Est. ~$122,564/yr.
